SessionStart.windows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { $r = if ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '__PACK_ROOT__' }; $env:SKILL_IMPROVE_ROOT = (Join-Path $r 'hooks'); $s = Join-Path $r 'hooks\scripts\skill-improve-session-start.ps1'; if (-not (Test-Path $s)) { exit 0 }; & $s }"

PostToolUse.command: bash --noprofile --norc -c 'R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-__PACK_ROOT__}"; export SKILL_IMPROVE_ROOT="$R/hooks"; S="$R/hooks/scripts/track-telemetry.sh"; [ -f "$S" ] || exit 0; cd "$R/hooks" && chmod +x "$S" && "$S"'
PostToolUse.osx: bash --noprofile --norc -c 'R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-__PACK_ROOT__}"; export SKILL_IMPROVE_ROOT="$R/hooks"; S="$R/hooks/scripts/track-telemetry.sh"; [ -f "$S" ] || exit 0; cd "$R/hooks" && chmod +x "$S" && "$S"'
PostToolUse.linux: bash --noprofile --norc -c 'R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-__PACK_ROOT__}"; export SKILL_IMPROVE_ROOT="$R/hooks"; S="$R/hooks/scripts/track-telemetry.sh"; [ -f "$S" ] || exit 0; cd "$R/hooks" && chmod +x "$S" && "$S"'
PostToolUse.windows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { $r = if ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '__PACK_ROOT__' }; $env:SKILL_IMPROVE_ROOT = (Join-Path $r 'hooks'); $s = Join-Path $r 'hooks\scripts\track-telemetry.ps1'; if (-not (Test-Path $s)) { exit 0 }; Set-Location (Join-Path $r 'hooks'); & $s }"

powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { $r = if ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '__PACK_ROOT__' }; $env:SKILL_IMPROVE_ROOT = (Join-Path $r 'hooks'); $s = Join-Path $r 'hooks\scripts\skill-improve-detect.ps1'; if (-not (Test-Path $s)) { exit 0 }; & $s }"

Stop.windows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "& { $r = if ($env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT) { $env:CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT } else { '__PACK_ROOT__' }; $env:SKILL_IMPROVE_ROOT = (Join-Path $r 'hooks'); $s = Join-Path $r 'hooks\scripts\skill-improve-session-end.ps1'; if (-not (Test-Path $s)) { exit 0 }; & $s }"
